name: PowerShell Module Logging Setting Discovery
description: An attempt to enumerate or modify PowerShell module logging settings has been detected. This could be an adversary performing reconnaissance to understand system logging capabilities.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the registry access event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID (e.g., 13) for the registry event.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The full path to the process image that accessed the registry.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.

parameters.name: target_object
parameters.description: The registry key path that was accessed.

parameters.name: details
parameters.description: Additional details about the registry value set (if event ID 13).
